feed.title: blank
feed.subtitle: Jiahui's Personal Website | PhD student at UCSD

entry.title: Binary Options
entry.content:
Binary option markets seem to be interesting to me. There was some recent paper discussing the arbitrage over those markets.

To me it seems like there are some arbitrage opportunities over there. So one actually could leverage that. Also, CBOE is offering SPX Predict now. I am also waiting for that trading data to analyze.

Let us take an example first. Binary options are 0-1 bets.
